summary: Iteration 44: Tested Multiple Drawings System feature for Wayfinder infrastructure sizing calculator. All 14 features tested and PASSED.
passed_tests: 1. Drawing tabs - Drawing #1 tab exists by default - PASS
2. New Drawing button creates additional drawing tabs (#2) - PASS
3. Copy drawing (Duplicate) functionality works - creates '#1-copy' tab - PASS
4. Delete drawing removes the tab (but keeps at least 1) - PASS
5. Compare button appears when 2+ drawings exist - PASS
6. HA checkbox toggles and doubles SW# value (1 → 2) - PASS
7. HW# input is editable and changes persist - PASS
8. Srv# input is editable and changes persist - PASS
9. Services column toggle hides/shows the Services column - PASS
10. KW toggle hides/shows the KW column - PASS
11. HW SKU toggle hides/shows the Hardware SKU column - PASS
14. Export for Lucid button exists and is enabled - PASS
15. SW# column shows auto-calculated value (Srv# × HA multiplier) - PASS (verified: Srv#=2, HA=true → SW#=4)
critical_code_review_comments: DrawingManager.jsx correctly implements useDrawings hook with addDrawing, copyDrawing, deleteDrawing, renameDrawing functions
Column toggles (KW, Services, HW SKU) work correctly via showKW, showServices, showHardware state
Export for Lucid button triggers exportForLucid function with correct drawing name
Tab dropdown menu shows Rename, Duplicate, Delete options correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing customer 'Not Your Customer' with Data Center 1, Data Center 2, HQ Office, Site 4
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple Drawings System feature fully tested and working. Key features: (1) Drawing tabs with #1 default, (2) New Drawing creates #2, #3, etc., (3) Duplicate creates '-copy' suffix, (4) Delete removes tab but keeps at least 1, (5) Compare button appears with 2+ drawings, (6) HA checkbox doubles SW# (formula: Srv# × (HA ? 2 : 1)), (7) HW# is editable, (8) Column toggles (KW, Services, HW SKU) work, (9) Rpt/BOM checkboxes work, (10) Export for Lucid button present.
